coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Just go easy and stay comfortable. Your aerobic system will thank you later.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building your aerobic foundation. Consistency is key.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Fat oxidation zone - maximize mitochondrial efficiency at low intensity.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy, maintain steady pace, build aerobic base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2. Also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the aerobic engine. This is the foundation of everything.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy. Conversational pace. Build your base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2. Also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the aerobic engine. This is the foundation of everything.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy. Conversational pace. Build your base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Comfortably hard. Emphasis on 'hard' as the minutes tick by.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Tempo builds the bridge between endurance and threshold.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Zone 3: glycogen storage optimization, improved fat/sugar fuel crossover.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Steady effort. You should be breathing harder but in control.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Sweet spot: sweet enough to hurt, but not enough to quit. Probably.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is the most efficient zone. Maximum adaptation, manageable fatigue.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 88-94% FTP optimizes aerobic adaptation while managing glycolytic stress.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold steady. Not easy, not killing you. That's the sweet spot.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: FTP work. Where dreams of easy rides go to die.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is where you raise the ceiling. Every second counts.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Threshold intervals maximize lactate steady-state power development.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Hold your power. Breathe. Focus on smooth pedaling.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: VO2max work raises your aerobic ceiling. Embrace the discomfort!
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold efforts maximize time at >90% VO2max for aerobic adaptation.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2. Also known as 'why am I even here' pace.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the aerobic engine. This is the foundation of everything.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy. Conversational pace. Build your base.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Easy spinning. Just don't fall asleep.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Active recovery enhances blood flow and promotes adaptation.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low-intensity active recovery facilitates lactate clearance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy and enjoy the ride.
